We have written this page to provide you with privacy information that is specific to this mobile app. We describe in this privacy statement how these features work with any data you submit through them.

decoder_heading: Data we may collect from your mobile device
ident_heading: Data we may collect from your mobile device
heading_content_part: Data we may collect from your mobile deviceThis section describes types of data stored on your mobile device that you may choose to provide, or that we may access:

Photos\Media\Files:If you give this app permission to access your photo\media\files , we will only access your files\folders for the purpose of allowing you to save data in application, make export\import and backup.
Device information:The type of device you use and the device’s operating system version.
Camera:if you give the application permission to access the camera on your device, we will get access to the camera just to allow you to scan \ recognize the postal barcodes.
Geolocation information:This app does not collect any geolocation information.
Unique device IDs:This app does not collect your mobile device’s unique identification number.
